multi-auth-list.template: Run the multi-auth-list tool and output the result EXACTLY as returned, without any additional text.
multi-auth-list.description: List all configured OpenAI accounts and their status.

multi-auth-set-priority.template: Use the multi-auth-set-priority tool to set the requested account number and priority, then output the result EXACTLY as returned, without any additional text.
multi-auth-set-priority.description: Set an OpenAI account priority. Lower numbers are selected first.

multi-auth-set-google-priority.template: Use the multi-auth-set-google-priority tool to set the requested Google account number and priority, then output the result EXACTLY as returned, without any additional text.
multi-auth-set-google-priority.description: Set a Google API-key account priority. Lower numbers are selected first.
